heading: Service of process
label: 154510 Service of process
text: The corporation shall comply with the law on service of process of each State in which it is incorporated and each State in which it carries on activities.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15451036:2804., , .Oct. 19, 1984Pub. L. 98–520, § 498 Stat. 2428The words “in furtherance of its corporate purposes” are omitted as unnecessary.
